member.name: M:Comos.Services.Ai.Api.AppRoot.CreateDefaultAIProviderConfiguration
member.summary: Creates a default AIProviderConfiguration with ollama-llama3.1-8b model.

member.name: M:Comos.Services.Ai.Api.AppRoot.CreateHttpClientHandler(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Creates a configured HttpClientHandler with SSL certificate validation. In Development environment, all certificates are accepted. In other environments, only valid certificates are accepted.
member.param: Configuration to determine the current environment.

member.name: T:Comos.Services.Ai.Api.AppRoot.DevelopmentServiceConfiguration
member.summary: Custom IServiceConfiguration implementation for development environment. Returns the AI config file path from the content root directory.

member.name: T:Comos.Services.Ai.Api.Controllers.CompletionsController
member.summary: REST API controller for interacting with various LLM providers. This controller acts as an entry point for chat completion requests, dynamically routing them to the appropriate LLM service based on configuration.

member.name: M:Comos.Services.Ai.Api.Controllers.CompletionsController.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Comos.Services.Ai.Api.Controllers.CompletionsController},Comos.Services.Ai.ChatModelProviderFactory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The logger instance for logging controller actions and errors.
The factory to create LLM chat clients dynamically.

member.name: M:Comos.Services.Ai.Api.Controllers.CompletionsController.RequestChatCompletion(Comos.Services.Ai.SharedContracts.Request.ChatCompletionRequest)
member.summary: Sends a chat completion request to the LLM backend. Maintains chat history using the provided SessionId.
member.param: Chat completion request containing model, messages, and session identifier.
member.returns: LLM response for the chat completion.

member.name: M:Comos.Services.Ai.Api.Controllers.CompletionsController.EvaluateFunctionCall(Comos.Services.Ai.SharedContracts.Request.ToolsEvaluationRequest)
member.summary: Evaluates a function (tool) call continuation using the specified (or default) provider/model. provider/model/systemPrompt come from the query string. POST /api/ai/v1/completions/evaluation

member.name: M:Comos.Services.Ai.Api.Controllers.CompletionsController.GenerateTitle(Comos.Services.Ai.SharedContracts.Request.ChatCompletionRequest)
member.summary: Handles a POST request to generate a title using the LLM backend.
member.param: The chat completion request containing the model, messages, and session identifier.
member.returns: An containing the LLM's generated title response if successful, or an error response if the operation fails.

member.name: M:Comos.Services.Ai.Api.Controllers.CompletionsController.GenerateFollowUpQuestions(Comos.Services.Ai.SharedContracts.Request.ChatCompletionRequest)
member.summary: Handles a POST request to generate a title using the LLM backend.
member.param: The chat completion request containing the model, messages, and session identifier.
member.returns: An containing the LLM's generated title response if successful, or an error response if the operation fails.

member.name: T:Comos.Services.Ai.Api.Controllers.RAGController
member.summary: REST API controller for interacting with Vector Services using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) and LLM. This controller acts as an entry point for chat completion requests, dynamically routing them to the appropriate LLM service based on configuration.

member.name: M:Comos.Services.Ai.Api.Controllers.RAGController.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Comos.Services.Ai.Api.Controllers.RAGController},Comos.Services.Ai.ChatModelProviderFactory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The logger instance for logging controller actions and errors.
The factory to create LLM chat clients dynamically.

member.name: T:Comos.Services.Ai.Configuration.AIApiServiceConfiguration
member.summary: Loader/parser responsible for creating from the AI API XML config file.

member.name: M:Comos.Services.Ai.Configuration.AIApiServiceConfiguration.ReadConfigurationSettings(System.Xml.XmlDocument)
member.summary: Loads AI service configuration from an XML file path.
Read all configuration settings from the XML document and populate AIProviderConfig. Parses model definitions and optional default model settings.

member.name: M:Comos.Services.Ai.Configuration.AIApiServiceConfiguration.GetAliasModel(System.Xml.XmlElement)
member.summary: Retrieves the LLM model alias from environment variable or XML configuration. Environment variable 'COMOS_LLM_MODEL' takes precedence over XML LlmModel element.
member.param: The root XML element containing the configuration
member.exception: Thrown when neither environment variable nor XML element provides a valid model alias
